prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6.7L Power Stroke Scorpion V8 (engine code: *7.3L Godzilla V8 crate engine from Ford Performance* for extreme durability, paired with a *Holset HE551VE turbocharger* with a 1.35 A/R turbine housing and 84mm compressor wheel for 50 psi of boost, supporting 1,200+ hp on E85 fuel with a *S&S Diesel billet fuel pump* and *16x Bosch 2000cc injectors*)

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a *Dana 80 rear axle* (3.73:1 gear ratio) upgraded with *ARP 80-series axle studs*, *Eaton Detroit Truetrac differential*, and *Randy’s Ring & Pinion 4340 chromoly gears*, paired with a *Meritor MFS-20 front axle* for 20,000 lbs GVWR capability and *Spicer 1810 series U-joints* for towing stability

Custom *Motec M150 ECU* standalone engine management with *AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors* and *Innovate Motorsports MTX-L Plus* for real-time EGT monitoring, paired with a *BD Diesel 6.7L Power Stroke compound turbo kit* (GTX5533R primary turbo + S400SX secondary turbo) for sequential turbocharging and *Fass 220 GPH fuel lift pump* with dual *Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulators*
estetica: Full *Rigid Industries SR-Series LED light bar* (50-inch, 30,000-lumen) mounted on a *Fab Fours Vengeance front bumper* with integrated *Warn Zeon 12-S winch* and *B&W RVK3326 gooseneck hitch* for 30,000 lbs towing capacity

Custom *Air Lift Performance 3P air suspension system* with *AccuAir ENDO-CVT management* for adjustable ride height, paired with *Bilstein 8112 remote-reservoir coilovers* (front) and *Bilstein 8100 shocks* (rear) for off-road articulation, wrapped in *Fuel Trophy wheels* (22x14, -76mm offset) with *Nitto Trail Grappler 40x13.5R22LT tires*

Full *Rocket Bunny F-350 widebody kit* (FRP construction) with *custom carbon fiber fender flares* (3-inch overhang per side), *Vortex V3 hood scoop* for intercooler cooling, and *Duraflex rear diffuser* with *Borla 3-inch cat-back exhaust* (dual 6-inch rolled-edge tips) for aggressive stance and sound
